subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one of Abdu'l-Baha! The Blessed Beauty Himself beareth witness and is well aware to what measure I cherish love for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء جمال ابهی شاهد و واقف که من بچه مثابه بتو محبت دارم و در جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
